# Scorched-Earth Erdős Sweep — Turn 155

This is turn 155. Turns 1 through 154 are consolidated in `turns_history__frontiermath_q2_galois.md` (attached). Re-read it before answering.
Also re-read `mega_prompt.md` and `problem_statement.md`.

CRITICAL — use ONLY the files attached to THIS message. Do NOT open, import, retrieve, or cite any file from your File Library / previously uploaded files, even one named similarly (e.g. another `turns_history…md`). Other unrelated problems use similarly named history files in the same account, and importing one will silently switch you onto the wrong problem. If the attached `turns_history__frontiermath_q2_galois.md` appears missing, do NOT continue from partial context. Reply only with `MISSING_REQUIRED_ATTACHMENT` and name the missing file(s); never substitute a library file.

If this turn drifts into hammering one specific case or sub-instance, step back and ask whether the case is revealing a structural pattern that would close many cases at once. Prefer arguments whose conclusion is a uniform statement.

End this response with ESTABLISHED / GAP / NEXT + tag.
Continue with Turn 155.

## Turn 155 — root certificate manifest assembled

I completed Turn 154’s requested provenance layer: a self-contained dependency DAG binding the frozen 256-byte \(h_0\) submission to Propositions I–III and the target-recurrence schema. Turn 154’s two reported Proposition-II artifact hashes are preserved exactly in the manifest. 

The checker reran the bundled boundary audit and a fresh Proposition-III finite Wall audit. All integrity, syntax, DAG, idempotent, and bundled-certificate checks passed. The exact submission remains compatible with the stipulated implicit tame relation, 2-core marking, and modulus-\(M\) exponent encoding. 

Root-manifest SHA-256:

```text
1c86f2a1cd3ef416ce64b6afc00d210b4f9ed39500dc0666740da1333da899ee
```

Submission SHA-256:

```text
4f81b04ae00e737a244f2445d70b095333a427508958f11489e3cabdc0192fdc
```

[Root-manifest bundle](sandbox:/mnt/data/turn155_h0_root_manifest_bundle.zip) · [Exact verifier submission](sandbox:/mnt/data/turn155_root_manifest/q2_galois_h0_submission.txt) · [Verification report](sandbox:/mnt/data/turn155_root_manifest/root_manifest_verification_report.json)

**ESTABLISHED**: Built and successfully verified the root provenance/dependency manifest for the frozen \(h_0\) submission. Added fresh executable audits for Proposition I and the finite inverse-action Wall identity; the latter exhausts both Arf classes in dimensions \(2\) and \(4\), covering all 102 relevant 2-power-order isometries with zero failures.

**GAP**: The private 5402-group verifier remains unrun. The original Turn-154 Proposition-II executable and JSON artifact were not attached to this turn, so their reported hashes are provenance-bound but their bytes could not be independently re-executed.

**NEXT**: Submit the unchanged 256-byte file to the private verifier; localize any rejection through the root DAG before altering the word.

[CONTINUE]
